# Lorlatinib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Lorlatinib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Lorlatinib</strong> 目前有 <strong>20 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Lorlatinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Lorviqua as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)?positive advanced non?small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) previously not treated with an ALK...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>fibromatosis, gingival（99.8%）</li>
<li>fibroma of lung（99.8%）</li>
<li>hamartoma of lung（99.8%）</li>
<li>lung hilum carcinoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>lung benign neoplasm（99.7%）</li>
<li>pulmonary sulcus neoplasm（99.7%）</li>
<li>lung germ cell tumor（99.7%）</li>
<li>inclusion body myopathy with early-onset Paget disease with or without frontotemporal dementia（99.7%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa（99.7%）</li>
<li>Leukomelanoderma-infantilism-intellectual disability-hypodontia-hypotrichosis syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>ovarioleukodystrophy（99.7%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa, non-Herlitz type（99.6%）</li>
<li>lung cancer（99.6%）</li>
<li>dehydratase deficiency（99.6%）</li>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（97.6%）</li>
<li>amyotrohpic lateral sclerosis type 22（92.5%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（91.9%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（91.8%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, susceptibility to（91.3%）</li>
<li>axial spondylometaphyseal dysplasia（90.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/lorlatinib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
